chapter_question: How can a limiting calculation keep its geometric meaning visible?
inspection_targets: The limiting ratio approaches one before any symbolic shortcut is trusted.
The small arc, chord, and tangent triangle make the derivative of tan visible.
The course route links metric, curvature, transport, and forms as one argument.

source_span.focus: Frames the book as a geometric alternative to unilluminating symbolic calculation and explains the five-act structure.
source_span.label: Prologue
source_span.title: Prologue
topics: Newtonian ultimate equality and geometric limiting arguments
The author's notation and stance on rigor
A critique of opaque algebraic calculation
The five-act dramatic organization of the book
Why Global Gauss-Bonnet, Riemann curvature, relativity, and Forms are central
Housekeeping conventions for equations, figures, framed results, and exercises
